prompts: no, the image should be from assets/icons/logo_fb-real-estate-poster.png
The edit posting options page has a toggle/switch control that should have the same styling and animation as those on the accounts setting page.

update the image ai promt with this one as the default: Create a photorealistic image of a building appropriate for a real estate listing based on the provided image. The home needs to be similar but not the same. Adjust the colors of the garage and or doors, and or roof and or home. Adjust the sytle of windows and or roof type and or roofline or the garage. You can adjust the driveway type (concrete, ashpalt, interlocking brick, somethiing else). Ensure we have serveral changes. to not make it a carbon copy of the origina building. If there are multiple homes only use the primary home in the photo, zoom in or out an necessary. Upscale if needed. Have the entire home in frame. Adjust the horizontal angle of the photo slightly. Keep the same number of floors. Do not change the type of building. IF the season is not winter or there is no snow THEN (IF there is a yard THEN we need to also adjst the landscaping with more or less trees in different locations). IF this is a single family home AND there are adjacent single family homes in the image THEN we also need to adjst the adjacent single family homes. IF this is an attached home or a carriage home then do not structually change this to make it a single family home. If it is a photo of an apartment building THEN keep it an apartment building. Remove any image water marks. Remove text from the image like street names and house numbers, and for sale signs or real estate signs.
